subject: Math
title: Word Problems
description: Multi-step real-world problems using all four operations.

questions.q: A box holds 24 cans. A store has 15 boxes. How many cans total?
Maria earns $8 per hour. She worked 6 hours Saturday and 4 Sunday. Total earned?
A bookshelf has 5 shelves with 32 books each. 47 books are removed. How many remain?
Tickets cost $6. The school collected $252. How many tickets sold?
The temperature was 68°F, rose 14° by noon, then dropped 9° by evening. Final temp?
A farmer plants 9 rows of corn (23 each) and 6 rows of beans (18 each). Total plants?
Sam has $5,000. He spends $1,275 and $820. How much is left?
A school buys 8 boxes of pencils (144 each), then gives 76 away. How many remain?
Lena has 48 stickers. She gives 1/4 to her friend. How many does she keep?
A car travels 65 miles per hour. How far in 3 hours?
